violations.text: Cooking utensils observed displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit (180 degrees F rinse temperature) was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. 3-bay sink was set up and tested during inspection and is to be utilized until dishwasher is serviced and reaching proper sanitizing temperatures. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024

Mashed potatoes and other foods observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2023
